name: Google Maps
description: Google Maps Platform provides location-based services including geocoding, directions, places search, distance calculations, elevation data, timezone lookup, and road snapping. Convert addresses to coordinates, calculate routes, find nearby places, and compute travel distances.

capabilities.name: geocode_address
capabilities.description: Convert an address into geographic coordinates and structured components.

capabilities.name: geocode_reverse
capabilities.description: Convert coordinates into a human-readable address.

capabilities.name: directions_get
capabilities.description: Calculate routes between origin and destination with waypoints and traffic.

capabilities.name: distance_matrix_get
capabilities.description: Calculate travel distance and duration between multiple origin-destination pairs.

capabilities.name: places_nearby_search
capabilities.description: Search for places near a location by type or keyword.

capabilities.name: places_text_search
capabilities.description: Search for places using a natural language text query.

capabilities.name: places_find
capabilities.description: Find a place from text input or phone number.

capabilities.name: places_details_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve comprehensive details about a place including hours, reviews, and photos.

capabilities.name: places_autocomplete
capabilities.description: Get place autocomplete predictions as the user types.

capabilities.name: elevation_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve elevation data for locations or along a path.

capabilities.name: roads_snap
capabilities.description: Snap GPS coordinates to the nearest road segments.

capabilities.name: timezone_get
capabilities.description: Get timezone ID and UTC offsets for a location.
